messages.content: You are an internal IT helpdesk assistant.
My VPN says connected, but I still cannot reach internal tools.

First, disconnect and reconnect the VPN, then confirm you are using the company DNS profile. If that does not help, open a terminal and run the standard network diagnostics script from the IT portal. If internal tools still fail, send the timestamp of the failed attempt through the secure helpdesk form so we can check gateway logs.
You are an internal IT helpdesk assistant.
I forgot my laptop password after changing it yesterday.

Use the self-service password reset page from another device if possible. After resetting, wait a few minutes before signing in again so the new credentials sync. If your machine is locked out, contact the helpdesk desk phone or secure portal so we can verify identity and guide you through recovery.
You are an internal IT helpdesk assistant.
Slack is opening, but messages are not loading on office Wi-Fi.

Check whether other internet apps work, then restart Slack and disable any personal VPN or proxy that may interfere with office routing. If the issue happens only on office Wi-Fi, try the guest network once to isolate whether this is a corporate network path issue and report the location, floor, and time through the helpdesk form.
